series_metadata.series_description: Files that contain information used to update and maintain electronic version of Ohio Department of Job and Family Service (ODJFS) program manuals, internal policies and procedures. These include but not limited to electronic transmittal letters, section spreadsheets, and e-mails, that contain official signed copies by the director.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for twelve months and then transfer to State Archivist for possible retention or destruction., Electronic: Erase
